{
  "summary": "The presenter demonstrates how to use the Astria AI platform to generate fashion images. They start by selecting a pose and a face reference from a library. They then interact with various slots like 'Tank top', 'Jeans', and 'Background' to view their descriptions. The presenter also shows how to use a context menu on a generated image to remove its background, and how to adjust the height parameter for the model.",
  "urls_visible": [
    "astria.aprompts.ai",
    "docs.google.
